approvedBy: Steve full-steam Standard-mode overnight Foundation instruction + Codex senior-engineer guardrail
notes: Approved as a no-auth Foundation worker reliability card. Scope: dry-run flag safety, retry/failure visibility, blocked scheduled job visibility, stale active-run alerting, Runtime Health worker reliability summary, focused read-only proof. Not approved: scheduler rewrite, new jobs, source extraction, Build Intel extraction, hub features, paid-source auth, Canva asset library, Marketing Video Lab, Meeting Vault Phase B, Drive permission mutation, or auto-restart-on-push install. Plan revised after Plan Critic asked for clearer operator value and speed budget. Plan updated during build after dogfood revealed one-shot dry-run worker status poisoning; dry-run must not overwrite LaunchAgent runtime truth.
